title: neotorularia aculeolata
intro: Neotorularia aculeolata, also known as the Burdock or Gobo, is a biennial or perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The roots and leaves of the Neotorularia aculeolata plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Neotorularia aculeolata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, making it a versatile and widely used medicinal herb.
